notes: Declared evolutive numerics for FreeGSNKE nl_solver/nlstepper. cover_window=true sets n_steps=min(max_steps, ceil((t_end-t_start)/dt)) so the formed-plasma window is covered (optional n_steps overrides). linear_only=true for robust smoke on MAST-U-like machines; script_timeout_s + max_solving_iterations bound runtime. FAIR-MAST Level-2 supplies measured voltages p1/p2/p4/p5 (primary drive); P6 uses from_current_ohmic (I×R from FreeGSNKE coil_resist); divertors D1–D7/Dp are declared 0 V (MAST-U-only). Profile alpha_m/alpha_n/fvac held from inverse IC; scale_paxis_with_ip=false by default (optional declared Ip scaling law — enable only when smoke-stable).
